title: Sqlitelogictest: IN operator return a single column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab3 (col0 Int32, col1 String, col2 Float32, col3 UInt8);
SELECT * FROM tab3 WHERE col0 IN (SELECT col0 FROM tab3 WHERE col3 = 1);
CREATE TABLE tab4 (col0 Int32, col1 Date NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col0;
key_bug_features: IN operator with complex expressions in WHERE clause
